notes: No direct shadcn equivalent; shadcn uses plain HTML headings or Typography patterns
Compound component — use Heading.H1 through Heading.H6 for explicit level
Each sub-component renders its native HTML heading element with preset typography tokens
breaking: Removed `level` prop — use compound sub-components instead (e.g., <Heading.H1>)
Removed forwardRef wrapper — each sub-component is a direct styled() call
